api/BLL.BalanceService.html.summary: Class BalanceService Namespace BLL Assembly BLL.dll Manages client account balances: periodic membership billing, balance enquiry, debt validation, and movement history. public class BalanceService Inheritance object BalanceService Inherited Members object.ToString() object.Equals(object) object.Equals(object, object) object.ReferenceEquals(object, object) object.GetHashCode() object.GetType() object.MemberwiseClone() Constructors BalanceService() Initializes the service with a new BitacoraService instance. public BalanceService() Methods CalcularSaldoMensual() Iterates over all clients in parallel and inserts a DeudaMembresia movement for those whose ProximaFechaPago has passed. Advances ProximaFechaPago by the membership's Regularidad days after each charge. Clients without a membership, with an inactive or free membership, or whose next payment date is still in the future are skipped silently. public void CalcularSaldoMensual() ConsultarBalance(Guid) Retrieves the current balance for a client from the vw_Balance SQL view. public Balance ConsultarBalance(Guid clienteId) Parameters clienteId Guid The client identifier. Returns Balance The Balance record, or null if no movements exist. ListarMovimientos(Guid, DateTime?, DateTime?) Returns the ledger movement history for a client, optionally filtered by date range. public List<Movimiento> ListarMovimientos(Guid clienteId, DateTime? desde, DateTime? hasta) Parameters clienteId Guid The client whose movements to fetch. desde DateTime? Optional inclusive lower bound on movement date. hasta DateTime? Optional inclusive upper bound on movement date. Returns List<Movimiento> ValidarDeuda(Guid, string) Throws if the client's balance is negative, optionally prefixing the message with a context label. Used as a guard in operations that require the client to be current on payments. public void ValidarDeuda(Guid clienteId, string contexto = null) Parameters clienteId Guid The client to validate. contexto string Optional operation name prepended to the error message for clarity. Exceptions InvalidOperationException Thrown when the client has an outstanding debt.

api/BLL.DTOs.AgendaDTO.html.title: Class AgendaDTO | mysite
api/BLL.DTOs.AgendaDTO.html.summary: Class AgendaDTO Namespace BLL.DTOs Assembly BLL.dll Represents a single availability window for a facility space on a given day of the week. public class AgendaDTO Inheritance object AgendaDTO Inherited Members object.ToString() object.Equals(object) object.Equals(object, object) object.ReferenceEquals(object, object) object.GetHashCode() object.GetType() object.MemberwiseClone() Remarks Used as the input/output model for AgendaService.ConfigurarAgenda. A space may have multiple AgendaDTO entries per day to model split availability windows. DiaSemana follows the DayOfWeek convention: 0 = Sunday … 6 = Saturday. Note: windows that cross midnight (i.e., HoraHasta < HoraDesde) are not currently supported and will be rejected by the service. Constructors AgendaDTO() public AgendaDTO() Properties DiaSemana Day of the week this window applies to (0 = Sunday, 6 = Saturday). public int DiaSemana { get; set; } Property Value int EspacioID FK to the space whose availability this window defines. public Guid EspacioID { get; set; } Property Value Guid HoraDesde Start of the availability window (inclusive). public TimeSpan HoraDesde { get; set; } Property Value TimeSpan HoraHasta End of the availability window (exclusive). Must be greater than HoraDesde. public TimeSpan HoraHasta { get; set; } Property Value TimeSpan

api/BLL.DTOs.ClienteStatus.html.title: Enum ClienteStatus | mysite
api/BLL.DTOs.ClienteStatus.html.summary: Enum ClienteStatus Namespace BLL.DTOs Assembly BLL.dll Indicates whether a client account is active or has been deactivated. public enum ClienteStatus Fields Activo = 0 The client account is active and fully operational. Inactivo = 1 The client account has been deactivated. See ClienteDTO.Razon for the reason. Remarks Inactive clients are blocked from facility entry by ClienteService.ValidarIngreso and from creating new reservations. The status is persisted as an integer column.

api/BLL.DTOs.EstadoBalance.html.summary: Enum EstadoBalance Namespace BLL.DTOs Assembly BLL.dll Categorized account balance state derived from the numeric balance value. public enum EstadoBalance Fields AFavor = 2 Balance is positive: the client has a credit in their account. api/BLL.Mappers.ClienteMapper.html.summary: Class ClienteMapper Namespace BLL.Mappers Assembly BLL.dll Bidirectional mapper between Cliente domain entities and ClienteDTO projections. public static class ClienteMapper Inheritance object ClienteMapper Inherited Members object.ToString() object.Equals(object) object.Equals(object, object) object.ReferenceEquals(object, object) object.GetHashCode() object.GetType() object.MemberwiseClone() Remarks ToDTO(Cliente, Membresia, Balance, DateTime?) accepts an optional Balance and proximaFechaPago so the caller can hydrate the DTO in a single pass without additional round-trips. When balance is null, Balance defaults to zero and EstadoBalance is set to AlDia. Unrecognized Estado string values are coerced to Activo and logged as warnings. Methods ToDTO(Cliente, Membresia, Balance, DateTime?) Projects a Cliente entity to a ClienteDTO. public static ClienteDTO ToDTO(Cliente entity, Membresia membresia, Balance balance, DateTime? proximaFechaPago = null) Parameters entity Cliente Source entity. Returns null when null. membresia Membresia Membership entity to embed as MembresiaDetalle, or null. balance Balance Current balance record used to populate Balance and EstadoBalance. proximaFechaPago DateTime? Next billing date from the active ClienteMembresia row, or null. Returns ClienteDTO ToEntity(ClienteDTO) Projects a ClienteDTO back to a Cliente entity. public static Cliente ToEntity(ClienteDTO dto) Parameters dto ClienteDTO Source DTO. Returns null when null. api/BLL.Services.AgendaService.html.summary: Class AgendaService Namespace BLL.Services Assembly BLL.dll Business logic service for configuring and querying a sports space's weekly operating schedule (agenda). public class AgendaService Inheritance object AgendaService Inherited Members object.ToString() object.Equals(object) object.Equals(object, object) object.ReferenceEquals(object, object) object.GetHashCode() object.GetType() object.MemberwiseClone() Constructors AgendaService() Initializes dependencies from DalFactory singletons. public AgendaService() Methods ConfigurarAgenda(Guid, List<AgendaDTO>) Atomically replaces the entire agenda of a space by deleting all existing blocks and inserting the new set in a single transaction. public void ConfigurarAgenda(Guid espacioId, List<AgendaDTO> agendasDto) Parameters espacioId Guid The space whose agenda will be replaced. agendasDto List<AgendaDTO> The new schedule blocks. Each block's HoraDesde must be earlier than HoraHasta. Blocks on the same day must not overlap. Remarks Known limitation: Agenda ranges crossing midnight (e.g., 22:00-02:00) are explicitly prevented by the UI validation here. They must be split into two ranges: 22:00-23:59 and 00:00-02:00. Exceptions ArgumentNullException Thrown when agendasDto is null. ArgumentException Thrown when a block has HoraDesde >= HoraHasta, or when two blocks on the same day overlap. ArgumentNullException Thrown if agendasDto is null. ArgumentException Thrown if any block has HoraDesde >= HoraHasta, or if two blocks for the same day overlap. Ranges crossing midnight are not supported and must be split. Exercises not found in the catalog are auto-created. public void CrearRutina(RutinaDTO dto) Parameters dto RutinaDTO Routine data including a non-empty exercise list. Each exercise must have positive repetitions and a valid day (1–7). Exceptions Exception Thrown for an empty exercise list, zero/negative repetitions, or out-of-range day values. Exception Thrown if the exercise list is empty, reps are zero, or day of week is out of range. ListarRutinas(bool) Returns all routines, optionally restricted to active ones, with ClienteNombre hydrated. public List<RutinaDTO> ListarRutinas(bool soloActivas) Parameters soloActivas bool When true, includes only routines with no end date. Returns RutinaDTO The RutinaDTO, or null if not found. Returns RutinaDTO The active RutinaDTO, or null if none exists.

api/DAL.Contracts.IUnitOfWork.html.summary: Interface IUnitOfWork Namespace DAL.Contracts Assembly DAL.dll Defines a transactional scope that shares a single database connection across multiple repositories. public interface IUnitOfWork : IDisposable Inherited Members IDisposable.Dispose() Remarks Obtain a new instance from CreateUnitOfWork(). The intended usage pattern is: using (var uow = DalFactory.CreateUnitOfWork()) { uow.BeginTransaction(); // use uow.*Repository to perform coordinated writes uow.Commit(); } If Commit() is never called, Dispose() will automatically roll back any open transaction when the using block exits. api/DAL.Factory.DalFactory.html.summary: Class DalFactory Namespace DAL.Factory Assembly DAL.dll Static service locator / factory for all repository singletons. public static class DalFactory Inheritance object DalFactory Inherited Members object.ToString() object.Equals(object) object.Equals(object, object) object.ReferenceEquals(object, object) object.GetHashCode() object.GetType() object.MemberwiseClone() Remarks Each property follows a lazy-initialization pattern (_field ?? (_field = new ImplClass())), so repository instances are created on first access and reused thereafter within the process lifetime. For single-repository (read-only) operations, use the singleton properties directly. For multi-repository write operations that require atomicity, use CreateUnitOfWork() to obtain a fresh IUnitOfWork instance that shares one connection and transaction across all enrolled repositories. api/DAL.Impl.SqlServer.UnitOfWork.html.title: Class UnitOfWork | mysite
api/DAL.Impl.SqlServer.UnitOfWork.html.summary: Class UnitOfWork Namespace DAL.Impl.SqlServer Assembly DAL.dll Implements the Unit of Work pattern for SQL Server. Manages a single SqlConnection and SqlTransaction shared across all enrolled repositories for the duration of one logical operation. public class UnitOfWork : IUnitOfWork, IDisposable Inheritance object UnitOfWork Implements IUnitOfWork IDisposable Inherited Members object.ToString() object.Equals(object) object.Equals(object, object) object.ReferenceEquals(object, object) object.GetHashCode() object.GetType() object.MemberwiseClone() Remarks Obtain an instance via CreateUnitOfWork(). Usage pattern: using (var uow = DalFactory.CreateUnitOfWork()) { uow.BeginTransaction(); // ...operations on uow.*Repository... uow.Commit(); } After Commit() or Rollback(), the instance is spent and cannot be reused; BeginTransaction() will throw ObjectDisposedException. Dispose() will roll back any uncommitted transaction if the using block exits without an explicit commit. Constructors UnitOfWork() Constructs all repository instances without opening a connection. public UnitOfWork() Properties AgendaRepository Repository for agenda (operating schedule) operations. public IAgendaRepository AgendaRepository { get; } Property Value IAgendaRepository ClienteMembresiaRepository Repository for client-membership assignment operations. public IClienteMembresiaRepository ClienteMembresiaRepository { get; } Property Value IClienteMembresiaRepository ClienteRepository Repository for client operations. public IClienteRepository ClienteRepository { get; } Property Value IClienteRepository EjercicioRepository Repository for exercise catalog operations. public IEjercicioRepository EjercicioRepository { get; } Property Value IEjercicioRepository EspacioRepository Repository for sports space operations. public IEspacioRepository EspacioRepository { get; } Property Value IEspacioRepository MembresiaRepository Repository for membership plan operations. public IMembresiaRepository MembresiaRepository { get; } Property Value IMembresiaRepository MovimientoRepository Repository for ledger movement (debit/credit) insertions. public IMovimientoRepository MovimientoRepository { get; } Property Value IMovimientoRepository PagoRepository Repository for payment operations. public IPagoRepository PagoRepository { get; } Property Value IPagoRepository ReservaRepository Repository for reservation operations. public IReservaRepository ReservaRepository { get; } Property Value IReservaRepository RutinaEjercicioRepository Repository for routine-exercise mapping operations. public IRutinaEjercicioRepository RutinaEjercicioRepository { get; } Property Value IRutinaEjercicioRepository RutinaRepository Repository for workout routine operations. public IRutinaRepository RutinaRepository { get; } Property Value IRutinaRepository Methods BeginTransaction() Opens the shared connection and begins a database transaction, injecting both into all repositories. public void BeginTransaction() Exceptions ObjectDisposedException Thrown if the instance has already been disposed or spent. InvalidOperationException Thrown if a transaction is already active on this instance. Commit() Commits the active transaction and closes the shared connection. public void Commit() Exceptions InvalidOperationException Thrown if no transaction is active. Dispose() Rolls back any uncommitted transaction and releases all resources. Called automatically at the end of a using block. public void Dispose() Rollback() Rolls back the active transaction and closes the shared connection. Safe to call even when no transaction is active (no-op in that case). public void Rollback()

api/Domain.Composite.Acceso.html.title: Class Acceso | mysite
api/Domain.Composite.Acceso.html.summary: Class Acceso Namespace Domain.Composite Assembly Domain.dll Abstract base component of the Composite design pattern used to model the permission tree. public abstract class Acceso Inheritance object Acceso Derived Familia Patente Inherited Members object.Equals(object) object.Equals(object, object) object.ReferenceEquals(object, object) object.GetHashCode() object.GetType() object.MemberwiseClone() Remarks A permission tree is composed of Familia interior nodes and Patente leaf nodes. All tree traversal and permission checks operate against the Acceso abstraction, allowing uniform treatment of individual permissions and permission groups. Constructors Acceso() protected Acceso() Properties Accesos Returns the direct children of this node. Leaf nodes (Patente) always return an empty list. public abstract List<Acceso> Accesos { get; } Property Value List<Acceso> Id Unique identifier of this access component. public Guid Id { get; set; } Property Value Guid Nombre Human-readable display name. public string Nombre { get; set; } Property Value string Methods Agregar(Acceso) Adds componente as a direct child of this node. public abstract void Agregar(Acceso componente) Parameters componente Acceso The component to add. Exceptions InvalidOperationException Thrown by leaf nodes (Patente) that do not support children. Eliminar(Acceso) Removes componente from the direct children of this node. public abstract void Eliminar(Acceso componente) Parameters componente Acceso The component to remove, matched by Id. Exceptions InvalidOperationException Thrown by leaf nodes (Patente) that do not support children. ToString() public override string ToString() Returns string

api/Domain.Composite.Familia.html.title: Class Familia | mysite
api/Domain.Composite.Familia.html.summary: Class Familia Namespace Domain.Composite Assembly Domain.dll Composite (interior) node in the permission tree that groups zero or more Acceso children, which may themselves be Familia instances or Patente leaves. public class Familia : Acceso Inheritance object Acceso Familia Inherited Members Acceso.ToString() Acceso.Id Acceso.Nombre object.Equals(object) object.Equals(object, object) object.ReferenceEquals(object, object) object.GetHashCode() object.GetType() object.MemberwiseClone() Remarks Duplicate children (same Id) are silently ignored on Agregar(Acceso). Constructors Familia() public Familia() Properties Accesos The direct children of this family node. public override List<Acceso> Accesos { get; } Property Value List<Acceso> Methods Agregar(Acceso) Adds componente to this family's child list. If a child with the same Id already exists, the call is a no-op. public override void Agregar(Acceso componente) Parameters componente Acceso The component to add. api/Domain.Composite.html.summary: Namespace Domain.Composite Classes Acceso Abstract base component of the Composite design pattern used to model the permission tree. Familia Composite (interior) node in the permission tree that groups zero or more Acceso children, which may themselves be Familia instances or Patente leaves. Patente Leaf node in the permission tree representing a single, atomic permission. PermisoKeys Defines the canonical string keys for every permission in the system.

api/Domain.Usuario.html.summary: Class Usuario Namespace Domain Assembly Domain.dll Domain entity representing an application user. public class Usuario Inheritance object Usuario Inherited Members object.ToString() object.Equals(object) object.Equals(object, object) object.ReferenceEquals(object, object) object.GetHashCode() object.GetType() object.MemberwiseClone() Remarks Password is stored as a SHA-256 hex digest (see Service.Helpers.CryptographyHelper.HashPassword). api/Service.Impl.BaseRepository.html.summary: Class BaseRepository Namespace Service.Impl Assembly Service.dll Abstract base class for all SQL Server repositories, providing low-level ADO.NET helpers. public abstract class BaseRepository Inheritance object BaseRepository Derived BaseBusinessSqlRepository FamiliaRepository LogRepository PatenteRepository UsuarioRepository Inherited Members object.ToString() object.Equals(object) object.Equals(object, object) object.ReferenceEquals(object, object) object.GetHashCode() object.GetType() object.MemberwiseClone() Remarks Each helper opens its own SqlConnection unless a shared conn is injected (used by DAL.Impl.BaseBusinessSqlRepository when enrolled in a DAL.Impl.SqlServer.UnitOfWork transaction). Constructors BaseRepository(string) Initializes the repository with the connection string identified by connectionStringName. public BaseRepository(string connectionStringName = "IngSoftwareBase") Parameters connectionStringName string Key used to look up the connection string via GetConnectionString(string). Defaults to BaseConnectionName. Fields _connectionString Raw ADO.NET connection string resolved from ConnectionManager. protected readonly string _connectionString Field Value string Methods ExecuteNonQuery(string, SqlParameter[], SqlConnection, SqlTransaction) Executes a non-query SQL statement (INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE). protected void ExecuteNonQuery(string query, SqlParameter[] parameters, SqlConnection conn = null, SqlTransaction tran = null) Parameters query string Parameterized SQL statement. parameters SqlParameter[] SQL parameters to bind, or null for none. conn SqlConnection Optional shared connection. When provided, the command runs on this connection using tran (if any), without opening a new connection. tran SqlTransaction Optional transaction to enlist the command in. ExecuteReader<T>(string, SqlParameter[], Func<SqlDataReader, T>) Executes a SELECT query and projects the result via a mapping delegate. Always opens a new connection; use BaseBusinessSqlRepository overload for UoW reads. protected T ExecuteReader<T>(string query, SqlParameter[] parameters, Func<SqlDataReader, T> map) Parameters query string Parameterized SQL SELECT statement. parameters SqlParameter[] SQL parameters to bind, or null for none. map Func<SqlDataReader, T> Delegate that receives the open SqlDataReader and returns T. Returns T The value produced by map. Type Parameters T The projection type returned by map. ExecuteScalar<T>(string, SqlParameter[]) Executes a scalar query and returns the first column of the first row. protected T ExecuteScalar<T>(string query, SqlParameter[] parameters) Parameters query string Parameterized SQL statement. parameters SqlParameter[] SQL parameters to bind, or null for none. Returns T The scalar value cast to T, or default(T) if the result is NULL. Type Parameters T The expected return type. DBNull is converted to default(T).

api/Service.Logic.UsuarioService.html.summary: Class UsuarioService Namespace Service.Logic Assembly Service.dll Manages user authentication, registration, profile updates, and password management. public class UsuarioService Inheritance object UsuarioService Inherited Members object.ToString() object.Equals(object) object.Equals(object, object) object.ReferenceEquals(object, object) object.GetHashCode() object.GetType() object.MemberwiseClone() Remarks Passwords are stored as SHA-256 hashes via HashPassword(string). Every write operation recomputes DigitoVerificador (a SHA-256 hash of all scalar fields) to enable tamper-detection on the user record. Permission assignments are delegated to UpdateAccesos(Guid, List<Acceso>), which performs a delete-and-reinsert of the user's access tree. Constructors UsuarioService() Initializes the service with the IUsuarioRepository singleton from FactoryDao. public UsuarioService() Methods Delete(Guid) Permanently deletes the user with the given identifier. public void Delete(Guid id) Parameters id Guid Primary key of the user to delete. Returns UsuarioDTO A UsuarioDTO with the authenticated user's identity, permissions, and resolved RolNegocio ("Administrador", "Operador", or a comma-separated list of permission names). Exceptions Exception Thrown with localized messages when the user is not found, the password is incorrect, or the account is blocked. Register(UsuarioDTO, string) Creates a new user account with the given permissions. public void Register(UsuarioDTO dto, string password) Parameters dto UsuarioDTO User data including optional initial permission set. password string Plaintext password; stored as a SHA-256 hash. Exceptions Exception Thrown when a user with the same username already exists. ResetPassword(Guid, string) Replaces a user's password with a new hashed value and updates the integrity check digit. public void ResetPassword(Guid id, string newPassword) Parameters id Guid Primary key of the user whose password to reset. newPassword string New plaintext password; stored as a SHA-256 hash. Exceptions Exception Thrown when the user does not exist. Update(UsuarioDTO) Updates a user's username, status, and permission set. public void Update(UsuarioDTO dto) Parameters dto UsuarioDTO Updated user data. Id must identify an existing user. Exceptions Exception Thrown when the user does not exist.
